title: Portfolio Tracker
description: Monitor multi-chain portfolio value and asset composition in real time — fetches all ERC-20 and native token balances with USD values, logos, and spam filtering.
useCase: Build a real-time portfolio dashboard that shows every asset a wallet holds with live USD prices and spam tokens filtered out automatically.

keyParams.chainName: EVM chain identifier (e.g. eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, matic-mainnet)
